args.sql: SELECT ProjectName, ProjectType, System, Name, Version FROM project_packageversion WHERE System = 'NPM' AND ProjectType = 'GITHUB';

WITH LatestVersions AS (
  SELECT System, Name, Version, 
         json_extract(VersionInfo, '$.Ordinal') AS Ordinal,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Name ORDER BY json_extract(VersionInfo, '$.Ordinal') DESC) AS rn
  FROM packageinfo
  WHERE System = 'NPM' AND VersionInfo IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT System, Name, Version
FROM LatestVersions
WHERE rn = 1;

WITH LatestVersions AS (
  SELECT System, Name, Version, 
         json_extract(VersionInfo, '$.Ordinal') AS Ordinal,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Name ORDER BY json_extract(VersionInfo, '$.Ordinal') DESC) AS rn
  FROM packageinfo
  WHERE System = 'NPM' AND VersionInfo IS NOT NULL
),
LatestNpmVersions AS (
  SELECT Name, Version
  FROM LatestVersions
  WHERE rn = 1
),
ProjectStars AS (
  SELECT ProjectName, 
         CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(Project_Information, '([0-9]+) stars') AS INTEGER) AS stars
  FROM project_info
  WHERE Project_Information LIKE '%stars%'
),
ProjectPackages AS (
  SELECT ProjectName, Name, Version
  FROM project_packageversion
  WHERE System = 'NPM' AND ProjectType = 'GITHUB'
)
SELECT pp.Name, pp.Version, ps.stars
FROM ProjectPackages pp
JOIN LatestNpmVersions lv ON pp.Name = lv.Name AND pp.Version = lv.Version
JOIN ProjectStars ps ON pp.ProjectName = ps.ProjectName
ORDER BY ps.stars DESC, pp.Name ASC
LIMIT 5;
